description: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text (3:1 for large text)
do_this: Use tools to verify contrast ratios; test in both light and dark mode
avoid_this: Gray-on-gray text; light colors on white; relying on visual check alone

description: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements
do_this: 2-4px focus ring with sufficient contrast; use :focus-visible
avoid_this: Removing outline:none without replacement; invisible focus indicators

description: Descriptive alt text for meaningful images
do_this: Write alt text that conveys the image purpose and content
avoid_this: Empty alt on meaningful images; alt text that says 'image' or filename

description: aria-label for icon-only buttons and controls
do_this: Add descriptive aria-label to every icon-only interactive element
avoid_this: Icon buttons without labels; generic labels like 'button' or 'click here'

description: Tab order matches visual order with full keyboard support
do_this: Ensure logical tab sequence; support Enter Space Escape shortcuts
avoid_this: Unreachable elements; focus traps; tab order mismatching visual layout

description: Use label element with for attribute on every input
do_this: Associate every input with a visible label element
avoid_this: Placeholder-only labels; hidden labels without aria alternative

description: Skip to main content link for keyboard users
do_this: Add skip link as first focusable element on every page
avoid_this: Missing skip links on content-heavy pages

description: Sequential heading levels without skipping
do_this: Use h1 through h6 in order; one h1 per page
avoid_this: Skipping heading levels (h1 to h3); using headings for styling only

description: Don't convey information by color alone
do_this: Add icon shape or text alongside color indicators
avoid_this: Red/green only for error/success; color-coded charts without patterns

keywords: dynamic type text scaling font size
description: Support system text scaling without layout breakage
do_this: Test at largest Dynamic Type size; use relative units
avoid_this: Fixed font sizes; truncation at larger text sizes; layout overflow

description: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query
do_this: Provide reduced or no animation alternative; test with setting on
avoid_this: Ignoring motion preferences; decorative animation without opt-out

description: Meaningful labels and logical reading order for screen readers
do_this: Test with VoiceOver/TalkBack; ensure logical content order
avoid_this: Missing accessibilityLabel; decorative elements announced to SR

description: Provide cancel and back options in modals and multi-step flows
do_this: Always include visible close/cancel in modals and wizards
avoid_this: Modals without close button; multi-step flows without back navigation

description: Preserve system shortcuts and provide keyboard alternatives
do_this: Support standard shortcuts; offer keyboard for drag-and-drop
avoid_this: Overriding system shortcuts; gesture-only interactions

description: Minimum 44x44pt (iOS) or 48x48dp (Android) touch targets
do_this: Use hitSlop to extend small visual elements; measure actual tap area
avoid_this: Tiny icon buttons; close-together links; text-only tap targets

description: Minimum 8px/8dp gap between adjacent touch targets
do_this: Maintain consistent spacing between all interactive elements
avoid_this: Cramped button groups; adjacent links without spacing

description: Use click/tap for primary interactions not hover alone
do_this: Make all hover interactions accessible via tap or click
avoid_this: Hover-only menus; tooltip-only information; hover-dependent features

description: Disable button during async operations and show loading state
do_this: Show spinner or progress; prevent double-submission
avoid_this: Buttons that can be tapped multiple times; no loading feedback

description: Clear error messages displayed near the problem
do_this: Show inline error below the relevant field with recovery guidance
avoid_this: Vague error messages; errors only at page top; no error at all

description: Add cursor:pointer to all clickable non-link elements
do_this: Set cursor pointer on buttons cards and interactive elements
avoid_this: Default cursor on clickable elements; pointer on non-interactive elements

description: Avoid horizontal swipe conflicts on main scrollable content
do_this: Use vertical scroll as primary; horizontal only in contained carousels
avoid_this: Full-width horizontal scroll areas; conflicting swipe directions

description: Eliminate 300ms tap delay on mobile
do_this: Use touch-action:manipulation on interactive elements
avoid_this: Ignoring tap delay; slow-feeling interactions on mobile

description: Use platform-standard gestures consistently
do_this: Follow iOS/Android gesture conventions; don't redefine standard gestures
avoid_this: Custom gestures replacing system ones; inconsistent gesture behavior

description: Visual feedback on press within 80-150ms
do_this: Ripple effect (Material) or opacity change on touch
avoid_this: No visual response to touch; delayed feedback beyond 150ms

description: Use haptic feedback for confirmations and important actions
do_this: Light haptic on toggle switch and confirmation; impact on errors
avoid_this: Haptic on every tap; no haptic on important state changes

description: Keep primary touch targets away from system UI areas
do_this: Respect safe area insets for all fixed elements
avoid_this: Buttons under notch; content behind gesture bar; ignoring safe areas

keywords: image webp avif srcset optimization lazy
description: Use modern formats and responsive images
do_this: WebP/AVIF with srcset/sizes; lazy load below-fold images
avoid_this: Uncompressed PNG; single-size images; eager-loading everything

keywords: image dimension width height cls layout-shift
description: Declare width/height or aspect-ratio on images
do_this: Set explicit dimensions or use aspect-ratio CSS property
avoid_this: Missing dimensions causing layout shift (CLS); images popping in

keywords: font loading swap foit fout display
description: Use font-display:swap or optional to prevent invisible text
do_this: Preload critical fonts; use font-display:swap; limit font variants
avoid_this: Loading all font weights upfront; invisible text during load

description: Prioritize above-the-fold CSS loading
do_this: Inline critical CSS or use early-loaded stylesheet for ATF content
avoid_this: Render-blocking CSS for below-fold content; large monolithic CSS

description: Lazy load non-hero components and routes
do_this: Route-level code splitting; dynamic imports for heavy components
avoid_this: Loading entire app bundle upfront; importing unused components

description: Split code by route and feature for smaller initial load
do_this: React Suspense boundaries; Next.js dynamic imports; tree shaking
avoid_this: Single monolithic bundle; importing entire libraries for one function

description: Virtualize lists with 50+ items for performance
do_this: Use FlatList/FlashList (RN) or react-window (web) for long lists
avoid_this: Rendering hundreds of DOM nodes; unmemoized list items

description: Keep per-frame work under 16ms for smooth 60fps
do_this: Move heavy computation off main thread; batch DOM operations
avoid_this: Synchronous heavy computation during scroll; layout thrashing

description: Use skeleton screens instead of blocking spinners
do_this: Skeleton placeholders matching content layout for >1s operations
avoid_this: Long-spinning loading indicators; blank screens during data fetch

description: Debounce/throttle high-frequency events
do_this: Debounce search input (300ms); throttle scroll handlers (16ms)
avoid_this: Firing API calls on every keystroke; unthrottled scroll listeners

description: Match visual style to product type and audience
do_this: Use --design-system to get style recommendations for product type
avoid_this: Glassmorphism on enterprise dashboards; brutalism on healthcare

description: Use the same visual style across all pages and components
do_this: Define style tokens and apply consistently; audit for drift
avoid_this: Mixing flat and skeuomorphic; different border radius per page

description: Use SVG icon libraries not emoji for UI elements
do_this: Lucide Heroicons react-native-vector-icons or @expo/vector-icons
avoid_this: Emoji as navigation icons; emoji as status indicators; emoji as buttons

description: Proper viewport meta tag without disabling zoom
do_this: width=device-width initial-scale=1; never maximum-scale=1
avoid_this: Disabling pinch-to-zoom; fixed-width viewport

description: Design mobile-first then scale up progressively
do_this: Start with mobile layout; add complexity at larger breakpoints
avoid_this: Desktop-first with mobile as afterthought; hiding content on mobile

description: Use systematic consistent breakpoints
do_this: 375 (phone) 768 (tablet) 1024 (laptop) 1440 (desktop)
avoid_this: Random breakpoints; device-specific widths; too many breakpoints

description: No horizontal scroll on mobile viewport
do_this: Ensure all content fits viewport width; test on 320px minimum
avoid_this: Overflowing content; fixed-width tables without horizontal scroll container

description: Use 4pt/8dp incremental spacing system
do_this: 4 8 12 16 24 32 48 spacing tokens applied consistently
avoid_this: Random pixel values; inconsistent padding between similar components

keywords: bottom nav tab bar limit 5 items
description: Bottom navigation maximum 5 items with labels
do_this: 3-5 tabs with icon + text label; highlight active state clearly
avoid_this: 6+ tabs; icon-only bottom nav; hidden labels

description: Back navigation must be predictable and preserve state
do_this: Restore scroll position and filter state on back; consistent behavior
avoid_this: Unpredictable back destinations; losing form input on back; scroll reset

description: All key screens must be reachable via deep link
do_this: Implement URL scheme and universal links for key screens
avoid_this: Important screens unreachable via URL; broken deep links

description: Use 150-300ms for micro-interactions; max 400ms for complex
do_this: 150ms for hover/toggle; 200-300ms for modal/slide; ease-out for enter
avoid_this: Animations >500ms; linear easing on UI; imperceptible fast animations

description: Animate only transform and opacity for smooth 60fps
do_this: Use translateX/Y scale opacity for all animations
avoid_this: Animating width height top left margin; triggering layout reflow

description: Show skeleton or progress indicator for loads >300ms
do_this: Skeleton matching content layout; progress bar for determinate tasks
avoid_this: Spinner for every load; no loading state; blocking full screen

description: Use ease-out for entering and ease-in for exiting
do_this: ease-out for elements appearing; ease-in for dismissing; spring for natural
avoid_this: Linear easing on UI elements; same easing for enter and exit

description: Visible label per input field (not placeholder-only)
do_this: Always pair input with visible label element above or beside it
avoid_this: Placeholder as only label; label disappearing on focus; hidden labels

description: Show validation error below the related input field
do_this: Inline error message below field with icon and recovery guidance
avoid_this: Errors only at form top; errors in toast; delayed error display

description: Show loading then success/error state on form submit
do_this: Disable button + spinner on submit; success checkmark or error message
avoid_this: No feedback after submit; allowing resubmission; silent failure

description: Helpful message and action when no content exists
do_this: Illustration + explanation + primary action CTA for empty views
avoid_this: Blank white screen; generic 'no data' text; no suggested action

description: Auto-dismiss toasts in 3-5 seconds with manual dismiss
do_this: 3s for info; 5s for actionable; always allow manual dismiss
avoid_this: Permanent toasts blocking content; too-fast dismiss (<2s)

description: Confirm before destructive or irreversible actions
do_this: Clear description of consequences; destructive action in red/danger color
avoid_this: Confirming routine actions; vague confirmation messages

description: Use 1.5-1.75 line-height for body text
do_this: 1.5 for UI text; 1.6-1.75 for long-form reading; tighter for headings
avoid_this: Line-height below 1.3 for body; too loose (>2.0) wasting space

keywords: font scale type size system hierarchy
description: Consistent typographic scale for hierarchy
do_this: Use a defined scale: 12 14 16 18 24 32 48; skip sizes intentionally
avoid_this: Random font sizes; too many size steps; no clear hierarchy

keywords: semantic color token primary surface error
description: Define semantic color tokens not raw hex values
do_this: primary secondary error surface on-surface as design tokens
avoid_this: Hardcoded hex in components; inconsistent color usage across pages

keywords: chart type data match trend comparison
description: Match chart type to data characteristics
do_this: Line for trends; bar for comparison; pie for proportion (max 5 slices)
avoid_this: Wrong chart type obscuring data; pie with 10+ slices

description: Always show chart legend positioned near the data
do_this: Place legend adjacent to chart; allow toggling series via legend click
avoid_this: Hidden legend; legend below scroll fold; no legend at all

keywords: tooltip chart hover tap data label
description: Show exact values on hover (web) or tap (mobile)
do_this: Tooltip with formatted value units and category on interaction
avoid_this: No tooltip; tooltip blocking other data points; tooltip off-screen
